description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage box with visible grain and a natural brown finish, featuring reinforced corners and a sturdy construction. The box has cut-out handholds on the shorter sides for easy lifting and carrying. The front and back panels are marked with black stenciled text, including the word 'PARAGON' and a Los Angeles address, giving it a vintage or industrial look. The interior is open and spacious, suitable for holding various items, and the box lacks any lid or top cover. The wood appears slightly weathered, suggesting it may have been used for transport or storage in urban or industrial settings. The overall design is utilitarian, with exposed fasteners and a robust build.
description: A vintage-style wooden storage box with cut-out handles and stenciled black lettering, featuring a weathered brown finish and open top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'PARAGON' stenciled text, Los Angeles address, and a cut-out handle.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain wooden panel with visible grain and a cut-out handle, no text.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with stenciled text and a cut-out handle, but text is mirrored.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with plain wood, visible grain, and a cut-out handle, no text.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: stenciled black lettering with address and brand name
